synopsis: Obi-Wan is dispatched to retrieve a rare artifact from the Dallenor, but he is reluctant to bring along his impulsive young apprentice, Anakin. After the death of his master, Qui-on, Obi-Wan struggles to believe he can be a good teacher for Anakin. But on Dallenor Anakin proves to be quite the resourceful Jedi student.
title: Age of Republic: Obi-Wan Kenobi
